creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:
mitmproxy can be installed by using pip3.11 as shown in my message above from 2024-05-01 22:38:26 UTC 

# mitmproxy --version
Mitmproxy: 12.0.0.dev (+2, commit af88265)
Python:    3.11.10
OpenSSL:   OpenSSL 3.0.13 30 Jan 2024
Platform:  FreeBSD-14.1-RELEASE-p5-amd64-64bit-ELF

This time only this file had to be edited:
.cargo/git/checkouts/boringtun-379ccad4d4acd372/e3252d9/boringtun/src/sleepyinstant/unix.rs

Because on FreeBSD: use Self::Uptime, as CLOCK_BOOTTIME is an alias for CLOCK_UPTIME.
